why: Protocol 775 Configuration serverbound minecraft:resource_pack must dispatch through Stevenarella packet_by_id using the official framed packet id and body bytes generated by the oracle answer. This is packet-support evidence only, not runtime resource pack UI or accept/reject behavior.
